hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/backend/src/.*\.ts$ ]]; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
